name: Glazed Shoyu Chicken Wings Fbfj97a
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove tips from wings. Leave whole or cut at the joint.
2. Place onions in a large wok or pan on medium heat.
3. Stir in sherry and soy sauce. Add sugar and bring to a full boil.
4. Reduce heat and place chicken in the mixture. Cover and simmer over low heat for 20 minutes, turning occasionally until done.
5. Sprinkle sesame seeds if desired. Makes 8-10.
